title: NonStupidVillagers
description: Makes villagers better by disabling nitwits, making villagers look for jobs day or night, and making them instantly get jobs.
body:
**DM ME ON DC [USER-WolfJTA] IF YOU WANT ME TO UPDATE THIS PLUGIN WITH A FEATURE YOU WANT OR TO HAVE ME MAKE A PLUGIN FOR YOU (FREEE)**

**USE DISCORD FOR ISSUES**

Insanely simple purpur/paper plugin that makes villagers a much more fun thing to work with. Added a few more braincells to them, you could say.
Features:
-Removes Nitwits from the game (no one liked them anyway)
-Lets villagers from spawn eggs take professions
-Lets villagers get a job day or night
-Instant Job-Taking
